verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_2: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]
verse.verse_3: And when the earth has been extended
verse.verse_4: And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it]
verse.verse_5: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] -
verse.verse_6: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it.
verse.verse_7: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,
verse.verse_8: He will be judged with an easy account
verse.verse_9: And return to his people in happiness.
verse.verse_10: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,
verse.verse_11: He will cry out for destruction
verse.verse_12: And [enter to] burn in a Blaze.
verse.verse_13: Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;
verse.verse_14: Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah].
verse.verse_15: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing.
verse.verse_16: So I swear by the twilight glow
verse.verse_17: And [by] the night and what it envelops
verse.verse_18: And [by] the moon when it becomes full
verse.verse_19: [That] you will surely experience state after state.
verse.verse_20: So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,
verse.verse_21: And when the Qur'an is recited to them, they do not prostrate [to Allah]?
verse.verse_22: But those who have disbelieved deny,
verse.verse_23: And Allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.
verse.verse_24: So give them tidings of a painful punishment,
verse.verse_25: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted.
